name: think-before-coding
title: Think Before Coding
description: Forces explicit reasoning before writing any code. Surfaces assumptions, manages confusion, and prevents hallucination by demanding clarity upfront.

name: goal-driven-execution
title: Goal-Driven Execution
description: Transforms imperative instructions into declarative goals with verifiable success criteria. Enables autonomous looping until verified completion.

name: idea-to-spec
title: Idea to Spec
description: Converts vague ideas into concrete, testable specifications with acceptance criteria. No implementation begins without a spec.

name: task-decomposition
title: Task Decomposition
description: Breaks features into atomic, independently verifiable tasks. No task should take more than 4 hours.

name: context-loading
title: Context Loading
description: Load minimum necessary context into agent context windows. Prevents token bloat, reduces cost, and improves focus.

name: multi-agent-orchestration
title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
description: Designs and coordinates multi-agent pipelines where specialized agents collaborate to complete complex tasks.

name: incremental-coding
title: Incremental Coding
description: Build in verifiable increments. Never implement more than can be tested right now.

name: simplicity-first
title: Simplicity First
description: Minimum code that solves the problem — nothing speculative. No premature abstractions.

name: surgical-changes
title: Surgical Changes
description: Touch only what you must. Leave the rest untouched. Every changed line must trace to the task.

name: api-design
title: API Design
description: Design stable, versioned, self-documenting APIs. Easy to use correctly, hard to use incorrectly.

name: frontend-engineering
title: Frontend Engineering
description: Accessible, performant, responsive UI patterns. Component design and Core Web Vitals compliance.

name: rag-and-memory
title: RAG & Memory
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation and agent memory patterns. Retrieves only relevant context, prevents context bloat.

name: test-driven-development
title: Test-Driven Development
description: Red-green-refactor cycle with meaningful coverage. Tests written before implementation.

name: debugging-methodology
title: Debugging Methodology
description: Systematic root cause analysis. Hypothesis-driven debugging — never guess-and-check.

name: integration-testing
title: Integration Testing
description: Test real system boundaries, not mocks of mocks. Integration tests verify components work together.

name: ai-output-validation
title: AI Output Validation
description: Validates, parses, and sanitizes AI-generated outputs before they reach end users or downstream systems.

name: code-review
title: Code Review
description: Structured code review focusing on correctness, security, and maintainability.

name: performance-optimization
title: Performance Optimization
description: Measure first, optimize second. Data-driven performance improvements with before/after benchmarks.

name: refactoring
title: Refactoring
description: Safe, behavior-preserving code transformation backed by tests. Refactor with evidence, not instinct.

name: documentation
title: Documentation
description: Document decisions, not just implementations. ADRs for architectural choices, runbooks for operations.

name: security-hardening
title: Security Hardening
description: OWASP Top 10, secrets management, and least-privilege principles before any code ships.

name: prompt-injection-defense
title: Prompt Injection Defense
description: Guards AI agents against prompt injection attacks — both direct and indirect.

name: hallucination-prevention
title: Hallucination Prevention
description: Detects and mitigates LLM hallucinations in production pipelines.

name: error-handling
title: Error Handling
description: Graceful degradation and meaningful error messages. Every error path is designed, not discovered.

name: observability
title: Observability
description: Structured logging, distributed tracing, and alerting for AI systems and traditional services.

name: production-deployment
title: Production Deployment
description: Zero-downtime deployments with pre-flight checks, staged rollouts, and rollback plans.

name: ci-cd-pipelines
title: CI/CD Pipelines
description: Automated quality gates from commit to production. Every merge to main is potentially shippable.

name: git-workflow
title: Git Workflow
description: Trunk-based development with atomic commits, clean history, and meaningful commit messages.

name: code-explanation
title: Code Explanation
description: Get layered, context-aware explanations of unfamiliar code. Understand what, why, and how to work with it safely.

name: meeting-notes-to-tasks
title: Meeting Notes to Tasks
description: Converts meeting notes into structured action items with owners and due dates.

name: research-and-summarize
title: Research & Summarize
description: Distill complex topics into layered, actionable summaries. Key insight first, detail second, action last.
